source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: The primary thesis for the 2025-2026 crypto rally was based on interest rate cuts. Historically, Bitcoin and alts move significantly following interest rate cuts. In 2021, rates were at all-time lows, allowing money flowing from stocks to flow into crypto. The thesis expected rate cuts in Q4 2025 or Q1 2026 to catalyze a mini-cycle.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: When Bitcoin broke its all-time high in late 2025, crypto topped out instead of rallying. This divergence from historical patterns broke market expectations. Sentiment on crypto Twitter turned bearish, many people lost money, were capitulating, and most positions were in drawdown (in the red).

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: After the BTC all-time high, gold had its run and AI stocks went up while crypto declined. Risk-on assets including crypto began to unravel. The correct move was in non-crypto assets, not crypto itself.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: In a downtrending market, buying the dip is dangerous. Dips can bleed out more. The buy-the-dip strategy only works when already in an uptrending market structure (bull run). Currently (June 2026), we are NOT in a V-shape recovery. We are in a bear market. Buying dips mindlessly in a downtrending market leads to further losses.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Technical analysis essentials for non-experts: focus on 3 indicators to start: moving averages, volume, and RSI. Significant levels in crypto are usually psychological round numbers, or identifiable via higher highs / higher lows / established support from previous market cycles.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Bitcoin follows a 4-year halving cycle. Each cycle peaks 12-18 months post-halving, then has a ~12-month correction. Historical drawdowns from peak to bottom: 2013 (86%), 2017 (84%), 2021 (78%). Average drawdown is approximately 80%. The peak-to-bottom duration: 2017 peak to bottom was 363 days, 2021 peak to bottom was 376 days.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Bitcoin price prediction for the 2028 halving cycle: $180,000 to $250,000. This implies a cycle top significantly above current all-time highs. JP Morgan independently predicted $170,000 for Bitcoin in coming months. Conservative targets cited: $160,000-$180,000. Aggressive/quarter-million targets also mentioned by financial analysts.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Bitcoin drawdown calculation from $126,000 all-time high: 70-75% drawdown = $30,000-$38,000 (massive fire sale zone). 50-60% drawdown = $50,000-$63,000. At time of filming, Bitcoin is at $64,000-$65,000. The $40,000-$30,000 range would be an extremely rare buying opportunity (fire sale).

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Dollar cost averaging (DCA) strategy for 2026: Start buying Bitcoin when price goes under $60,000. The entire gap below $60,000 is a DCA zone. Best course for 90% of people is DCA, know your income vs expense flow, cut unnecessary spending/splurging, and accumulate Bitcoin consistently during this bear market period.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Bottom prediction: October 2026 is the most likely bottom timing. The earliest bottom could be May 2026. However, if negative macro news emerges (e.g., AI displacing jobs, war escalation), more pain could follow. From October bottom, markets begin rallying. By January 2027, trend reversal should be confirmed.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: 2026 FOMC meeting dates: March 17, April 28, June 16, July 28, September 15, October 27, December 8. These are multiple opportunities for interest rate cuts. Expect at least 1-3 true rate cuts between June 2026 and Q4 2026. These rate cuts serve as liquidity events that eventually flow back into crypto.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Federal Reserve Chair Powell leaves office May 15, 2026. Kevin Warsh is the likely replacement. This creates a new Fed leadership dynamic. A new Fed chair could take a different monetary policy direction, potentially more dovish, which would accelerate rate cuts.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Midterm elections occur in October-November 2026. Since 1950, the average one-year return following midterms has been 15.4%, which is twice the return of all other years. Three reasons: (1) Policy certainty after elections lock in legislative agenda for 2 years, (2) President's party usually loses seats causing gridlock which is good for markets (less surprise, less spending, more confidence), (3) Presidents front-load pain in years 1-2 then juice economy in years 3-4 for re-election.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: War developments (particularly Iran) are underestimated. There is a strong possibility of continued Iran conflict. War announcements cause massive market dips. This could push Bitcoin under $50,000. However, such dips should be viewed as buying opportunities when zooming out on longer timeframes.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Bottom psychology: At the true bottom, no one will want to invest. Everyone will be scared. Potential bottoming catalysts include: revelation of Satoshi Nakamoto's identity, quantum computing threatening crypto, AI displacing jobs. These fear events mark the bottom and are when you should identify and start buying positions.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: 2027 should be incredibly bullish for crypto. This is the golden opportunity year. 2026 is for accumulating, DCA-ing, learning trends, and getting ahead. If you want to learn trading/futures, do it in 2026, not in 2027 when everyone is already making money and you're scrambling (and likely round-tripping gains from greed).

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Brian Jung's 2026 portfolio strategy: Diversifying significantly into stocks. Has invested millions from crypto gains back into markets. Exposure in private markets: AI, robotics, companies going to IPO soon. Also made $250,000 in 2025 from pre-IPO stocks (2-5x returns on pre-IPO share allocations). The key is asymmetric risk-reward opportunities.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Stock market narratives Brian Jung is bullish on for next 5-10 years: AI, robotics, defense contracts, health industry (peptides, GLP-1), nuclear energy, drones, defense software. These are generational wealth creators. Stocks move slower than crypto but the market is bigger and more evergreen.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Diversification strategy: With a good enough diversified split across assets, expect 4-5x returns. Example: Starting with $200,000 and hitting 4-5x = $1 million. Look for assets down 50-80% from previous highs for asymmetric upside. Robinhood cited as example of a stock down from all-time high with potential for recovery.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Contrarian principle: The assets people ignore the most produce the biggest wins. For aggressive risk-tolerant investors, all coins (alts) are the best asymmetric bet. Bitcoin from $50,000 to $175,000-$200,000 = 4.5-5x in the bull case. Better returns come from buying alts near the Bitcoin bottom.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Next crypto narratives for 2026-2027 cycle: (1) AI agents - the biggest narrative. Previous cycle had Virtuals, AI XVT (bought at $30-40K, sold at $750K). (2) Meme coins - always return. (3) Real World Assets (RWA). (4) DeFi. (5) Projects with buyback/revenue mechanisms.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: X402 Protocol: Open standard developed by Coinbase. Repurposes old HTTP 402 payment required status code. No direct token exposure exists yet. AI agents performing on-chain actions will need USDC. X402 is the glue between real world, AI agents, and crypto. This is the infrastructure for the next cycle's AI agent adoption.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Coinbase launched Agent Kit wallet on February 11. Proven use case with X402 protocol. Virtuals is a key project to watch for the next cycle - if it breaks previous all-time highs from current levels, that's already a 667% gain, with potential for another tremendous leg up.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Meme coin cycle history: 2021 had Doge and Shiba Inu. Post-2021 had Bonk, Dog with Hat, Ski Mask Dog. Meme coins and crypto are inseparable (like PB&J). Meme coins will have another run in the upcoming year. Focus on sub $10-50M market cap coins that have continued building and growing throughout the bear market.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Pengu (Pudgy Penguins token) is a blue-chip meme coin to watch. At time of filming, reaching previous all-time highs would be a 600% gain. Pudgy Penguins has brand presence (Sphere in Vegas, plushies, race cars, billions of views on GIFs). They are linked to the Abstract ecosystem. When Bitcoin bottoms and moves up 5%, these tokens move up 20-40% in a single day.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Abstract ecosystem: Pudgy Penguins is the follow-up/predecessor to Abstract. Abstract has been building for years. When market conditions turn around, Abstract will be an area where significant liquidity flows. Similar to how Base ecosystem was front-run for millions in previous cycle.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Kraken is creating Ink Chain. Not overly bullish yet - unclear what they will do differently vs Base which has performed well. However, never dismiss any project. Possibility for them to run when they release a token.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Real World Assets (RWA) narrative: Larry Fink (BlackRock) has talked about tokenization and bringing the world on chain. If he says it will happen, take his word. Problem: no good exposure plays yet. Ondo was tracked but hasn't had much upside. Until a clear definitive play with unique upside emerges, acknowledge RWA as narrative but limited asymmetric opportunity currently.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: DeFi narrative: Always present. Favorite DeFi product is Aave. Team has continued building. App looks like legitimate Web2 app. Offers consistent yield, audited, trustworthy. If crypto correlated with project quality, Aave should be top 10 coin.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Hyperliquid (HYPE): Currently at $27. Believed to be undervalued. Has outperformed most assets and Bitcoin since the year started. Airdropped tens of billions back to crypto community. Team continues building. Currently ranked #13 crypto. Prediction: could hit $100 when market picks up. New money and traders will eye this when market conditions flip.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Pump (PUMP): Currently ranked #72. Has been declining in price. Has activated buyback mechanisms in the past. Team has generated significant revenue and continues investing. From current market lows to previous highs, still 422% upside. Team is not expected to disappear.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: NFTs: Despite widespread hate, NFTs were successful - massively adopted, celebrities involved. Market was damaged by Yuga Labs and hedge funds rugging retail. With Meta and Oakley creating hardware converging real world and digital world, there is a place for NFTs. Prediction: Latter half of 2027 through 2028 will see NFT resurgence.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: The next cycle will be different: everything gets easier. Current friction in crypto (bridging, migrating tokens) will be solved with new tech. AI will be able to execute complex multi-step operations (bridge, transfer, buy, grow portfolio) on your behalf. Whoever gets AI-powered trading/investing right before market conditions pick up will be among the biggest winners in crypto.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: AI agents in trading/finance: Within the next year, expect headlines of people making significant money using AI or AI agents making millions for them. 5-10 years ago, goldfish picking stocks outperformed humans. Prediction markets are emerging where insider trading is becoming easier. Be creative and adaptable - those people will be rewarded.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Gold and silver: Long-term bullish, but these assets have already broken all-time highs. No interest in buying at current levels - no asymmetric upside. High-leverage traders might still do well. For 10-20 year investment horizon, diversification into gold/silver is fine, but better asymmetric opportunities exist in assets down 50-80%.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Risk management lesson: After nearly losing everything after the 2021 cycle, learned risk management the hard way. Key principle: size up in the right early narratives and right plays, don't go completely degen. Bigger winners make up for losers. You won't hit everything - nobody hits home runs every time. A few true home runs make losses a small fraction of overall portfolio growth.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Psychology of success: Making millions was not about being smart - it was about trusting the system, having faith, putting in the work, researching, and having conviction when nobody else did. The edge comes from doing work during bear markets to learn tech, narratives, and market mechanics, then waiting for right conditions.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Crypto market age context: Stock market has been around for 400 years. Cryptocurrency has existed since Bitcoin's launch in January 2009 (about 16 years old). A 16-year-old market vs 400-year-old market will see massive fluctuations. Early cycles will be volatile with big ups and downs. This is normal for a young market.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Bitcoin long-term conviction: Bitcoin will eventually be $1 million in our lifetime. Crypto will not disappear. We will continue seeing cycles as in the last 4-5 years. Altcoins will continue making new floors and going higher as cycles progress. Crypto is the only market with true high risk/high reward. Things can go to zero, but the market persists.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Patience principle (James 1:4): Your job right now is to be as patient as possible. The people who win in the upcoming cycle are those who can sit through the fire, make decisive calculated choices, and hold off on life pleasures (new Porsche, new house). With prediction markets and gambling becoming more accessible, everyone rushes to make money. Those who stay patient from now until crypto/stock bull runs will reap what they sow.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Edge in crypto vs other markets: Crypto is better than other markets because you can have a much stronger definitive edge. Not competing against players with inside information, politicians, quant data, Wall Street, hedge funds. In early markets, you reap what you sow - put in work during bear markets, learn, then capitalize when conditions return.

source: youtube-interviews/how I plan to make millions investing in crypto 2026.md
content: Kaizen community partnership: Kaizen (Brian's community) partnered with Genesis - a free tool that helps members get better edge in trading. Addresses the mechanical nature of trading (rules, discipline, meditation). AI-powered tools now exist to help traders get reps up in the market without losing everything, improving edge, and becoming consistently profitable traders.
